# Kotlin | Sentry for Kotlin

Sentry supports JVM related use of Kotlin with the [Java](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/java.md) SDK. For native Android applications, use the [Android](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/android.md) SDK. If you use KMP, the [Kotlin Multiplatform](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/kotlin/guides/kotlin-multiplatform.md) SDK provides the best integration.

Select your platform to get started:

* [Java](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/java.md)
* [Android](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/android.md)
* [Kotlin Multiplatform](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/kotlin/guides/kotlin-multiplatform.md)
* [Compose Multiplatform](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/kotlin/guides/compose-multiplatform.md)

## [Kotlin Extensions](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/kotlin.md#kotlin-extensions)

* [Using Sentry SDK with Coroutines](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/java/enriching-events/scopes.md#kotlin-coroutines)

## Frameworks

- [Compose Multiplatform](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/kotlin/guides/compose-multiplatform.md)
- [Kotlin Multiplatform](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/kotlin/guides/kotlin-multiplatform.md)
